name: implementation-slice-v2
description: V2 implementation-slice prototype: read-only planning, bounded foreach implementation in managed worktrees, and read-only review reduce. Describe scope in IMPLEMENTATION_TASK.md.

stages.prompt: Read IMPLEMENTATION_TASK.md if present. Produce JSON with a bounded workItems array of independently reviewable implementation slices.

each.prompt: Implement this scoped work item in the managed worktree only: ${item}. Keep changes minimal and report validation commands.

stages.prompt: Review implementation outputs and artifact paths. Summarize completed slices, blockers, risks, and recommended human next action. Do not auto-merge.
